calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-12-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-16-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tina Paxton.
Paul Rosenstein, Esq. for for Plaintiff: Cleasby Manufacturing Co., Inc., a California corporation.
Plaintiff's Witness: John Cleasby, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Dawn R. McWhorter, ind and dba Advanced Mobile Services.
EXH. 1 - Fictitious Business Name Stetement-------------ID/EVID.
EXH. 2 - Ledger-----------------------------------------ID/EVID.
EXH. 3 - Statement--------------------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Principal of $10,083.55
Costs per memo of cost.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the EXHIBITS in open court, and to prepare Proposed Judgment.

Jan. 13, 2006
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-16-2005 Set For Trial On Dec-12-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2005 Set For Trial On Dec-05-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
